title: Opponent Ladder
description: Static configuration for the opponent progression. Read by run.sh on every invocation; the current rung is determined by the operator via the playbook, not by this file.

map.description: Fixed map for every run in this feature (Clarifications Q4).

seed.description: Fixed RNG seed for every run in this feature (Clarifications Q5).

rungs.description: Ordered list of opponent rungs. MUST contain at least one no-op rung (first) and at least one competitive rung (second) — see FR-012 and SC-011.

name.description: Unique short name for this rung, e.g. 'NullAI' or 'BARb/easy'. Used in run directory naming and HISTORY.md.

opponent.description: Opponent AI short name as recognised by the engine, e.g. 'NullAI', 'BARb'.

options.description: Options map passed to EngineConfig.OpponentAIOptions for this rung. May be empty.

max_frames.description: Frame limit for this rung. Runs that reach this count terminate with outcome='timeout'.
